headline: Why is Morgan Stanley Bullish on Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (CRL) as a Top Stock to Buy According to Ariel Investment?
summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE:CRL) is one of the top stocks to buy according to Ariel Investments. On June 17, Morgan Stanley upgraded Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE:CRL) to an Overweight from Equalweight and raised the price target to $220 from $185. The research firm remains bullish on the company’s long-term prospects and […]

headline: Which Retailer Can Deliver My Order the Fastest?
summary: Investing.com -- Delivery speed is emerging as a key competitive advantage for retailers as AI-powered shopping assistants become more common, with Morgan Stanley’s latest analysis finding Walmart offers the strongest overall fulfillment model. At the same time, Amazon Now leads on raw delivery speed.
